password_reset_email_sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent
email_change_requested: Confirmation sent to your new email address
invalid_token_type: Invalid token type for this route
reset_link_invalid_or_expired: Reset link is invalid or expired
verification_link_invalid_or_expired: Verification link is invalid or expired
confirmation_link_invalid_or_expired: Confirmation link is invalid or expired
too_many_failed_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
too_many_requests_destination: Too many requests for this destination
too_many_otp_requests_destination: Too many OTP requests for this destination
no_password_credential: No password credential on this account
password_must_differ: New password must differ from current password
verified_email_required_for_password: A verified email is required before setting a password
real_email_required_for_password: Add a real email address before setting a password
password_credential_exists: Password credential already exists; use change-password instead
no_phone_to_enroll: No phone on file; provide a phone to enroll
no_email_to_enroll: No email on file; provide an email to enroll
enable_2fa_before_backup_codes: Enable a 2FA method before generating backup codes
totp_no_sent_code: TOTP does not require a sent code
sms_otp_not_enabled: SMS OTP is not enabled on this server
method_not_available_for_challenge: Method not available for this challenge
